description_long: This is a heavily armored tracked combat vehicle with a rusted, weathered exterior and a boxy, angular hull. The vehicle features a large, cylindrical turret mounted centrally on the roof, with a prominent, short-barreled main gun and a secondary, smaller barrel beside it. The tracks are wide and robust, designed for traversing rough terrain, and the hull is covered in sloped armor plating with visible wear, rust, and patches of white residue. The rear of the vehicle has a circular hatch and venting, while the sides show graffiti and additional surface corrosion. The overall appearance suggests a vehicle built for urban combat, with reinforced armor and minimal external markings.
description: A rusted, armored tracked combat vehicle with a large turret and dual barrels, featuring sloped armor and heavy weathering.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sloped armor, dual barrels protruding from the turret, and wide tracks.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the cylindrical turret, short main gun, and extensive rust and weathering on the hull.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals a circular hatch, venting, and the back of the tracks, with less visible weaponry.
description_view_3: Right side view displays graffiti, the turret profile, and the full length of the tracks.
attribute_weapon_mounts: Two visible weapon mounts: one large main gun and one smaller secondary barrel, both mounted on the central turret.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, sloped steel armor plating; visible rust and weathering, no modular or reactive panels apparent.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: No camouflage pattern; exterior is a solid rusted red-brown with patches of white residue and graffiti.
attribute_military_markings: No visible military markings, insignia, or numbers.
